# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 2000
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-app
        image: node:18-alpine
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: mongodb-secret
              key: uri
        - name: NODE_ENV
          value: "production"
        command: ["node", "server.js"]
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: regcred
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice-svc
spec:
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 3000
  type: ClusterIP
